commands: docker run -d --name agones-palworld-e2e -p 8211:8211/udp -p 8212:8212/tcp -p 25575:25575/tcp -e PUID=1000 -e PGID=1000 -e PORT=8211 -e PLAYERS=4 -e SERVER_NAME=e2e -e ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin -e RCON_ENABLED=true -e REST_API_ENABLED=true -e REST_API_PORT=8212 -e MULTITHREADING=true kbve/agones-palworld:latest

echo 'Waiting for Palworld to come up...' && for i in $(seq 1 900); do if curl -fsS -u admin:e2e-admin http://127.0.0.1:8212/v1/api/info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Palworld ready after '"$i"'s'; break; fi; if [ $i -eq 900 ]; then echo 'Palworld did not start in 900s'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -120; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

echo 'Verifying UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded...' && for i in $(seq 1 120); do f=$(docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'find /palworld -name UE4SS.log 2>/dev/null | head -1' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$f" ] && docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "grep -qi PalChatRelay '$f'" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded'; break; fi; if [ $i -eq 120 ]; then echo 'UE4SS/PalChatRelay did not load'; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'find /palworld -name UE4SS.log -exec tail -n 60 {} +' 2>/dev/null || true; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -80; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

PALWORLD_HOST=127.0.0.1 PALWORLD_REST=8212 PALWORLD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin npx vitest run; EC=$?; echo '--- container logs ---'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -120; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit $EC
